zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan Fitzgerald於1509年6月1日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克金薩爾時，她的父親James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond29歲，母親Amy Turlogh O'Brien18歲。她於1532年與James Butler結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1565年1月2日在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克阿斯可亞頓享年55歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan Fitzgerald于1509年6月1日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克金薩爾时，她的父亲James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond29岁，母亲Amy Turlogh O'Brien18岁。她于1532年与James Butler结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1565年1月2日在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克阿斯可亞頓享年55岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzgerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan Fitzgerald was born on 1 June 1509, in Kinsale, County Cork, Ireland, her father, James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond, was 29 and her mother, Amy Turlogh O'Brien, was 18. She married James Butler in 1532. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 2 January 1565, in Askeaton, County Limerick, Ireland, at the age of 55, and was buried in County Limerick, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan Fitzgerald est née le 1 juin 1509, à Kinsale, County Cork, Irlande, son père, James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Amy Turlogh O'Brien, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé James Butler en 1532. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 janvier 1565, à Askeaton, County Limerick, Irlande, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à County Limerick, Irlande.

de.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan Fitzgerald am 1. Juni 1509 in Kinsale, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond 29 und ihre Mutter Amy Turlogh O'Brien 18. Sie hat 1532 James Butler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. Januar 1565 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Askeaton, County Limerick, Irland und wurde in County Limerick, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Fitzgerald è nata il il 1 giugno 1509 nel Kinsale, County Cork, Irlanda, sua padre, James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Amy Turlogh O'Brien, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato James Butler nel 1532. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 gennaio 1565, nel Askeaton, County Limerick, Irlanda, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a County Limerick, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Fitzgeraldが1509年6月1日にアイルランドコウントイ コルクキンサルで生まれた時，父James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmondは29歳，母Amy Turlogh O'Brienは18歳であった。1532年にJames Butlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1565年1月2日にアイルランドコウントイ リメリックアスケアトンで55歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ リメリックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Fitzgerald(이)가 1509년 6월 1일 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 킨세일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amy Turlogh O'Brien(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1532년 James Butler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 1월 2일 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 아스케앳에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Fitzgerald nasceu em 1 de junho de 1509, em Kinsale, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Amy Turlogh O'Brien, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com James Butler em 1532. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1565, em Askeaton, County Limerick, Irlanda, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em County Limerick, Irlanda.

ru.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: коунти оф т кросс оф типпирэри, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan Fitzgerald родилась 1 июня 1509 г. в местности кинсеил, коунти корк, Ирландия, её отцу по имени James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Amy Turlogh O'Brien, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Butler в 1532 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 января 1565 г. в местности аскитон, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности коунти лимирикк, Ирландия.

Se casó con James Butler en 1532. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de enero de 1565, en Askeaton, County Limerick, Irlanda, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en County Limerick, Irlanda.
